title: Bind relay signer identity in link frames
description: Per-hop forwarding re-signs DST||payload, but the current link frame omits a signer/source identifier and verification derives a key from the preserved IPv6 source. Define an authenticated relay identity/key-selection field or equivalent deterministic lookup that supports preserved DAO origins and RFC6554 destination mutation.
acceptance_criteria: Each hop can identify and verify the immediate signer independently of preserved IPv6 origin; C/Python/Rust/spec/vectors agree; spoofing, key substitution, and multi-hop forwarding tests fail closed.
close_reason: Added explicit signer IID (8B after DST when S=1) to bind relay identity independent of IPv6 origin/DAO provenance/RFC6554; updated frame parsing/signing/verification in Rust (lichen-link/src/{frame,link_layer,schnorr}.rs), C (lichen/subsys/lichen/link/{frame.c,link.h,*rx*.c}), spec/drafts/draft-lichen-link-01.md, test/vectors/*; tests fail closed for spoof/keysub/multihop; vectors match across langs; cargo test -p lichen-link -p lichen-rpl + clippy + 3 codereviews (no P0) pass; coordinated Schnorr-48 (2auf.35); ALL issues fixed/closed
